name: O'henry Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 300°F.
2. Mix all ingredients, except chocolate chips and peanut butter, in a bowl until combined.
3. Press the mixture into a lightly greased 11x13-inch pan.
4. Bake for no more than 12 minutes.
5. Allow the bars to cool completely before serving.
TOPPING:
1. Melt chocolate chips and peanut butter together.
2. Spread the melted topping evenly over the cooled bars.
3. Chill until the chocolate is set.
